docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, JOSE A. AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, MANUEL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
